# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';

const EDGE_CONFIG = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG || {};

const API_KEY = EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY || 'vercel_default_key_789';
const DB_URL = EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL || 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com';

export default async function handler(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
  if (req.method === 'GET') {
    try {
      const config = await fetch(`${EDGE_CONFIG.EDGE_CONFIG_URL}/config`);
      const data = await config.json();
      EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY = data.apiKey;
      EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL = data.dbUrl;
      API_KEY = EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY;
      DB_URL = EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL;

      res.status(200).json({ apiKey: API_KEY, dbUrl: DB_URL });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      res.status(500).json({ message: 'Error fetching config' });
    }
  }

  if (req.method === 'POST') {
    try {
      const body = req.body;
      EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY = body.apiKey || API_KEY;
      EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL = body.dbUrl || DB_URL;

      res.status(200).json({ apiKey: EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY, dbUrl: EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      res.status(500).json({ message: 'Error updating config' });
    }
  }

  if (req.method === 'DELETE') {
    try {
      EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY = API_KEY;
      EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL = DB_URL;

      res.status(200).json({ apiKey: EDGE_CONFIG.API_KEY, dbUrl: EDGE_CONFIG.DB_URL });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      res.status(500).json({ message: 'Error deleting config' });
    }
  }

  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    try {
      const headers = {
        'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
        'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS',
        'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type',
      };

      res.status(200).json(headers);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      res.status(500).json({ message: 'Error handling options request' });
    }
  }

  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    if (!req.method || !['GET', 'POST', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'].includes(req.method)) {
      res.status(405).json({ message: 'Method not allowed' });
      resolve();
    } else {
      resolve();
    }
  });
}
